query:
SELECT re.nomeExame, re.trimestre, re.dataExame, re.resultado, re.createdAt 
FROM resultadosExames re 
JOIN gestantes g ON re.gestanteId = g.id 
WHERE g.nome = 'TESTE TESTE' 
AND re.nomeExame IN ('Hemoglobina/Hematócrito', 'Plaquetas')
ORDER BY re.nomeExame, re.trimestre, re.dataExame
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT re.nomeExame, re.trimestre, re.dataExame, re.resultado, re.createdAt 
FROM resultadosExames re 
JOIN gestantes g ON re.gestanteId = g.id 
WHERE g.nome = 'TESTE TESTE' 
AND re.nomeExame IN ('Hemoglobina/Hematócrito', 'Plaquetas')
ORDER BY re.nomeExame, re.trimestre, re.dataExame
